title: SyncCycleReceipt
description: Immutable receipt emitted after a content sync cycle is planned or applied. Captures the before/after content view versions, steps executed, outcome, and audit reference. Owned by SourceOS-Linux/sourceos-syncd.

specVersion.description: sourceos-spec version this receipt was emitted against.

cycleId.description: Correlation ID for the sync cycle; may span plan + apply.

engineId.description: SyncEngineManifest engineId that produced this receipt.

fromVersion.description: Content view version before the sync; null on first sync.

toVersion.description: Content view version targeted by this sync.

locus.description: Execution locus at which the sync was authorized.

policyGate.description: Policy gate value from the ContentSyncPlan (allowed, denied, no-op).

policyReason.description: Human-readable reason for the policy gate decision.

nixCacheUrl.description: Pulp content server URL used as the Nix binary cache.

flakeRef.description: NixOS flake ref passed to nixos-rebuild.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the sync execution in milliseconds.

auditId.description: AuditEvent id that records this sync cycle in the append-only audit log.

agentplaneRunRef.description: Optional URN or path reference to the agentplane RunArtifact that triggered the build producing this sync cycle. Links the governance execution trace to the SourceOS sync event.
